methodology: Derived static time-series cache built from reviewed page caches and local/CI provider caches. The browser reads this generated JSON only and never calls market-data providers directly.

sources.macro: tmp/macro-cache/fred plus app/public/data/macro-calendar.json metadata when available

macro.ICSA.value.source: FRED / U.S. Employment and Training Administration

macro.RRPONTSYD.value.source: FRED / Federal Reserve Bank of New York

macro.NET_LIQUIDITY.value.source: Derived from FRED WALCL / WRESBAL / WTREGEN / RRPONTSYD static caches

macro.FED_ASSETS_EX_TGA.value.source: Derived from FRED WALCL / WRESBAL / WTREGEN / RRPONTSYD static caches

macro.RESERVES_PLUS_RRP.value.source: Derived from FRED WALCL / WRESBAL / WTREGEN / RRPONTSYD static caches

macro.TGA_PLUS_RRP.value.source: Derived from FRED WALCL / WRESBAL / WTREGEN / RRPONTSYD static caches

macro.RESERVES_SHARE_WALCL.value.source: Derived from FRED WALCL / WRESBAL / WTREGEN / RRPONTSYD static caches
